title: Palette 256 - Simple Colored Blocks
description: A total of 256 simple colored blocks to go crazy with.
body:
Wouldn't it be great to have more freedom with color choice in a build? Well 256 colored blocks is a lot of freedom. My primary objective with the mod was to have more color options for Chisel and Bits enthusiasts. Its a very simple mod. There might be a couple colors I might have forgotten so do let me know if you can figure out which ones. If this interests enough people like it does me I might increase the number of colors by quite a lot in the coming iterations.

I recommend using the mod alongside Chisel & Bits - Fabric or Bits and Chisels.
I also recommend the use of REI (Roughly Enough Items) or EMI (EMI).

The blocks are crafted with Black Concrete in a Stonecutter.

Some of the blocks from the mod.
